title: CHAPTER 3. OFFICERS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3. OFFICERS

Rule 3.1.  Officers

           The officers of the Senate shall be a President, President Pro Tempore, Secretary, and Sergeant at Arms.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 3.  OFFICERS
Rule 3.1.  Officers
The officers of the Senate shall be a President, President Pro Tempore, Secretary,
and Sergeant at Arms.
